Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Akheva Ruins
NPC Name
A shade golem
Shaded stones

Echo Caverns
NPC Name
a stonegrabber

Erudin Palace
NPC Name
a water elemental

Nagafen's Lair
NPC Name
lava guardian

Najena
NPC Name
an earth elemental

Plane of Hate
NPC Name
a forlorn revenant
a spite golem

Plane of Hate B
NPC Name
a spite golem
a vengeance golem

Ruins of Old Paineel (The Hole)
NPC Name
a broken construct
a broken gargoyle
a crumbling gargoyle
a massive construct
a ratman inhabitant
a stone ward
an elemental warrior
an old construct

Solusek's Eye (Solusek A)
NPC Name
blazing elemental

Steamfont Mountains
NPC Name
an earth elemental

The Grey
NPC Name
a boulder fiend
a boulderling
a stone beast

The Overthere
NPC Name
a cliff golem

The Twilight Sea
NPC Name
an earth elemental

Used in 2 recipes.
Recipe list - Premium only.

Just a note, it's for Black Dye on Fine Plate armors. Also may be found onvarious elementals, elemental warriors in The Hole, iron and stone guardians in Nektulos, golem-types, including Terror(Plane of Fear)
